scripts.test: node ../e2e-gate.mjs --suite @feed/e2e --requires 'MetaMask extension (bun run download-extensions) + app on :3000 (auto-started via the keyless localnet harness when nothing is listening)' -- npx playwright test --config playwright.config.mjs
